title: Concordia and Fraaisig teachers rake in awards at provincial leg of National Teachers Awards 2025.
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Rochelle Witbooi of Concordia...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Rochelle Witbooi of Concordia Primary School has been recognised for Excellence in Primary School Leadership at the provincial leg of the National Teaching Awards.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Rochelle Witbooi of Concordia Primary School has been recognised for Excellence in Primary School Leadership at the provincial leg of the National Teaching Awards."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Another provincial winner from the Knysna area is Kirsten Tomé of Fraaisig Primary School, who was honoured for Excellence in Technology-Enhanced Teaching and Learning."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These awards highlight their outstanding dedication to education, innovation and school leadership.","html":"These awards highlight their outstanding dedication to education, innovation and school leadership."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kirsten Tomé. Photo: WCED","html":"Kirsten Tomé. Photo: WCED"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this week's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this week's edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
